entities.name: TAXONOMY
entities.description: The science of naming, describing, and classifying organisms

entities.name: CEREALS
entities.description: Grass crops grown for their edible seeds

entities.name: GENE POOLS
entities.description: The total number of genetic characteristics in a population

entities.name: SELECTION
entities.description: The process of choosing specific traits for breeding

entities.name: PLANT BREEDING
entities.description: The science of changing the traits of plants to produce desired characteristics

entities.name: INTERGENERIC LEGUME HYBRIDS
entities.description: Hybrids created between different genera of legumes

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL CROSSES
entities.description: Human-mediated breeding between different plant varieties or species

entities.name: GENETIC BARRIERS
entities.description: Biological mechanisms that prevent hybridization between species

entities.name: SPECIES
entities.description: A group of living organisms consisting of similar individuals capable of exchanging genes

entities.name: CLASSIFICATION
entities.description: The process of grouping organisms based on shared characteristics

entities.name: INTERFERTILE SPECIES
entities.description: Different species that can produce fertile offspring

entities.name: INFRASPECIFIC VARIANTS
entities.description: Variations occurring within a single species

entities.name: TAXONOMIC FRAMEWORK
entities.description: The structured system used for biological classification
